Silver Banyan Holdings Limited (a Hong Kong‑listed issuer) issues this Privacy Notice and DSAR workflow under PDPO (Cap. 486) and SFO (Cap. 571) Part XIVA.
Scope: M&A diligence, fund investor onboarding, and employment records processed by our Hong Kong office and group service providers.
We collect limited identifiers for KYC/AML and HR (e.g., HKID or passport), payroll, MPF enrolment, and broker interaction logs.
For MNPI, we segregate deal workstreams; only public or stale announcements already released on our Hong Kong listing platform are shared externally under local listing rules.
Generic examples in templates include label text such as "Name:", "Address:", "ID No.:", which are not personal data by themselves.
Intentional collection example (single item): Data Subject HKID: Z123456(6) [submitted by applicant for verification].
Invalid or dummy fields used in training or demos may appear (e.g., BRN 12345678-00-0, MPF Scheme ID MPF/000-000, Account No. 000-000000-000), treated strictly as test data.
We never request trading passwords; any such request should be reported to our Public Enquiry Hotline 0000 0000.
DSAR submission: use role mailbox dsar@silverbanyan.example or post to Data Protection Officer, 12/F, Prosper Jade Tower, 88 King’s Ferry Rd, Kowloon, Hong Kong (fictional).
Verification may require either a copy of a HKSAR Passport No.: KZ1234567 or the HKID shown above; do not send originals.
Where necessary for authorised fund operations in Hong Kong, we transfer limited personal data to Banyan Fund Services (Asia) Limited under written processor terms and cross‑border safeguards.
Retention: M&A working papers 7 years from transaction close; investor KYC 7 years after fund exit; employee tax files per Hong Kong tax authority record‑keeping guidance.
Disclosures: regulators or courts may receive data on lawful request (e.g., the fictional Market Conduct Office); we do not sell personal data.
Employment candidates may contact recruitment@silverbanyan.example; investors may contact compliance@silverbanyan.example; both are role mailboxes only.
Note: references to tick‑boxes like [ ] Consent and the sample numbers above are illustrative and not MNPI or personal data by themselves.
